core_mechanism: randomized low-rank approximation by projecting a matrix onto a random low-dimensional subspace (random sketching) to capture its dominant singular subspace with near-optimal accuracy
brief_reason: The abstract seeks an efficient low-rank approximation of an arbitrary-size matrix whose accuracy comes provably close to the best possible rank-deficient approximation in the spectral norm, which is the signature of randomized projection/sketching methods for extracting a matrix's leading singular structure.
